_doc: P39.6b deterministic overworld decorative scatter. `density` = the fraction of eligible tiles (per terrain) that carry a decorative prop; placement is a stable per-world-position hash so it never flickers and is identical in the top-down and isometric renderers. RUBBLE (what ruins/destroyed buildings leave behind) gets gravestones + bones, so scatter clings to ruined places without needing to query locations.
